criteria.description: map-requirements reads spec.md from the primary checkout regardless of coord worktree
criteria.evidence: test_primary_feature_dir_is_not_coord_worktree in tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/agent/test_map_requirements_spec_path.py — PASSED; spec_md = primary_dir / SPEC_MD_FILENAME in tasks.py map_requirements
criteria.notes: primary_feature_dir_for_mission replaces feature_dir for spec_md only; feature_dir unchanged downstream

criteria.description: map-requirements continues to resolve WP task files from topology-aware path
criteria.evidence: Code review confirmed feature_dir (topology-aware resolve_feature_dir_for_slug) remains for all downstream WP access; only spec_md line changed
criteria.notes: diff shows feature_dir usage unchanged below the spec_md swap

criteria.description: validate_glob_matches zero-match error includes ready-to-paste YAML create_intent example
criteria.evidence: test_literal_zero_match_error_hints_create_intent PASSED (green); error now ends with '\n  create_intent:\n    - {pattern}'
criteria.notes: Only the final msg += line changed; suggestion logic and errors.append untouched

criteria.description: Regression test asserts error text contains both path and create_intent YAML key
criteria.evidence: test_literal_zero_match_error_hints_create_intent asserts '  create_intent:\n    -' in error_text AND absent_path in error_text — PASSED after fix, FAILED before (ATDD confirmed)
criteria.notes: YAML-syntax assertion (not just field name substring) was absent pre-fix

criteria.description: Regression test asserts map-requirements succeeds when coord worktree exists and spec.md is only in primary checkout
criteria.evidence: test_primary_feature_dir_is_not_coord_worktree PASSED; asserts result path has no .worktrees component
criteria.notes: Test committed as ATDD-first standalone commit before implementation
